title: Noesis v1.5 crypto symbol hygiene in JIT/static gates
goal: Noesis recursive/session gates currently pass but print undefined crypto symbols for _eshkol_hmac_sha256, _eshkol_random_bytes, _eshkol_random_hex, and _eshkol_sha256. Make those symbols cleanly available or fail closed; release gates must not succeed with unresolved-symbol diagnostics.
acceptance: gate_v1_5_recursive and gate_v1_5_session produce no unresolved crypto symbol diagnostics
missing crypto linkage fails explicitly instead of being masked by fallback behavior
-r and AOT/static-link paths are covered where applicable
